arts.ttl: Team News: Aston Villa vs. Paris Saint-Germain injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash between Aston Villa and Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: Villa say Rashford, Watkins partnership 'next step'

arts.ttl: PSG ‘bored’ over weekend after Nantes match postponed to aid Aston Villa preparation
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain’s Luis Enrique and Ousmane Dembélé (27) said that they were “bored” over the weekend after their match against FC Nantes was postponed to aid their preparations for Aston Villa. PSG,…

arts.ttl: Why Chelsea-Backed Strasbourg Won’t Be a Threat to PSG Anytime Soon
arts.sum: RC Strasbourg may be enjoying a dream 2024-25 season with a real shot at the UEFA Champions League, but don’t expect them to be challenging Paris Saint-Germain for the Ligue 1 title anytime soon. The club is owned by BlueCo — the same consortium behind Chelsea, led by Todd Boehly, Clearlake Capital, Mark Walter, and […] The post Why Chelsea-Backed Strasbourg Won’t Be a Threat to PSG Anytime Soon appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique: ‘Tomorrow’s match will be very intense’
arts.sum: The Paris Saint-Germain coach spoke at his pre-match press conference and with PSG TV before the second leg of the UEFA Champions League quarter-final against Aston Villa FC, on Tuesday 15 April at 21:00 (in France, 20:00 in the UK) at Villa Park. "The objectives are very clear: to solve the problems that this Aston Villa team will pose for us during the match, and to win the game.

arts.ttl: Ousmane Dembélé: 'I am really enjoying myself in this team'
arts.sum: On the eve of the UEFA Champions League quarter-final second leg against Aston Villa FC, on Tuesday 15 April at 21:00 in France (20:00 in the UK) at Villa Park, the Paris Saint-Germain forward appeared at the pre-match press conference and answered questions from PSG TV. "I believe I'm one of the key players in the team, but I've stayed the same, as always.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe's illness revealed as Newcastle Utd boss breaks silence and club confirm plan for Crystal Palace and Aston Villa
arts.sum: Howe wasn't in charge of the team for their 4-1 win over Man Utd at St James' Park and won;t ben on the bench for next two games

arts.ttl: Villa can write themselves into history - Emery
arts.sum: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery says his players should view the second leg of their Champions League showdown with Paris St-Germain as a chance to write themselves into the club's history books.

arts.ttl: Ousmane Dembele fires Anfield warning ahead of Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembélé has warned Aston Villa that Paris Saint-Germain will be playing to win at Villa Park on Tuesday night, rather than simply protecting their advantage. The Paris Saint-Germain winger spoke to the media ahead of facing Aston Villa in the Champions League
